div1.entryFree:
Wrathful, 1) angry: John II, 87. H6A IV, 3, 28. H6B III, 2, 155. IV, 2, 134. Troil. V, 2, 38. Lr. III, 2, 43.
2) raging, furious, impetuous: grating shock of w. iron arms, R2 I, 3, 136. valiant as the w. dove or most magnanimous mouse, H4B III, 2, 171. his sparkling eyes, replete with w. fire, H6A I, 1, 12. barren winter with his w. nipping cold, H6B II, 4, 3. your w. weapons drawn, III, 2, 237. heart, be w. still, V, 2, 70. a wayward son, spiteful and w., who . . . loves for his own ends, Mcb. III, 5, 12.
